findings.evidence: Grep hits show only the raw defs at lines 46, 68, and 119; the existing coefficient API has `MatrixCoefficient.lean:68:theorem matrixCoefficient_def`.
findings.fix: Add `matrixCoefficientSet_def`, `matrixCoefficientSubmodule_def`, and `matrixCoefficientSubalgebra_def` rfl lemmas matching the style of `matrixCoefficient_def`.
findings.issue: The public definitions `matrixCoefficientSet`, `matrixCoefficientSubmodule`, and `matrixCoefficientSubalgebra` have no `*_def` restatement, so users must unfold the definitions to rewrite to `Set.range`, `Submodule.span`, or `Algebra.adjoin`.

findings.evidence: Line 50 marks `matrixCoefficient_mem_set` as `@[simp]`, but lines 72 and 123 declare the analogous generated-subobject membership lemmas without any automation attribute.
findings.fix: Mark `matrixCoefficient_mem_submodule` and `matrixCoefficient_mem_subalgebra` with `@[simp]`; they are one-way normal-form membership facts and do not introduce loops.
findings.issue: The generator-introduction lemmas for the generated submodule and subalgebra are not marked `@[simp]`, so `simp` will not close goals of the form `matrixCoefficient φ m ∈ matrixCoefficientSubmodule/Subalgebra`.

summary: The new generated-coefficient objects expose the right core declarations, but the public API is incomplete for use without unfolding. Add definition restatements and automation annotations for the characteristic generator-membership lemmas.
